data.description: The company reports that its helium supply is adequate and that the ongoing Iran crisis is unlikely to impact SK Hynix.
According to Taiwan’s Economy Ministry, the days of inventory for both oil and natural gas currently exceed the required minimums.

The Taiwanese Economy Ministry has instructed oil firms to raise their fuel stockpiles and report inventory and shipping schedule data every day.
The government of Taiwan has assured that LNG deliveries will be stable throughout the month.
According to China’s government research chief, the 2026 economic growth goal can be met through determined efforts.

data.title: OpenAI collaborates with Tata Group for 1GW AI infrastructure in India, deploying ChatGPT for TCS employees at data centers ranging from 100MW to 1GW.
data.description: OpenAI has announced the initiation of their India project in collaboration with the Tata Group, beginning with the establishment of data centers with a capacity of 100 megawatts, and with plans to scale up to 1 gigawatt. As part of this initiative, the deployment of ChatGPT Enterprise is scheduled for hundreds of thousands of employees at Tata Consultancy Services (TCS).
The state news agency reports that Saudi Arabia has intercepted a drone in the eastern part of the Jawf region.

data.title: Coinbase, Microsoft, and Europol team up to dismantle 'Tycoon 2FA', responsible for 62% of phishing attempts blocked by Microsoft, targeting over 30 million emails in a month.
data.description: By the middle of last year, Microsoft reported that Tycoon 2FA was associated with 62% of phishing attempts that the company successfully blocked. This included an astonishing number of over 30 million emails in just one month.
The Information reports that OpenAI’s annualized revenue reached over $25 billion by the end of last month.

data.title: Tech giants pledge to support White House energy initiative as tensions rise in Iran. Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI to fund upgrades amid increasing AI energy demands.
data.description: Seven major tech companies including Amazon, Google, Meta, Microsoft, OpenAI, Oracle, and xAI have announced their collaboration to finance electricity supply and grid enhancements in response to the rising energy requirements driven by artificial intelligence. The companies have united to invest in upgrading infrastructure to support the increasing demands of AI technology.

data.title: Tech giants sign pledge with Trump to cover AI energy costs, as data centers require PR boost, says US President.
data.description: President Trump has commented that AI data centers require improved public relations, stating that tech giants will cover the costs for powering their energy-intensive projects.

data.title: Yichang: The green heartbeat of the Yangtze
data.description: On March 4, 2026, a report released by China Daily highlighted the city of Yichang in China, known for hosting the world's biggest hydropower project located on the Yangtze River. This initiative is significantly contributing to China's shift towards clean energy, playing a pivotal role in both rejuvenating the local ecosystem and preserving its cultural heritage. Yichang's prominent Three Gorges area stands as a testament to the success of this project, showcasing the city's commitment to sustainable development and environmental conservation.

data.title: HONOR CEO Takes Center Stage at MWC 2026, While Robot Phone Praised for its Innovation and Integration of Intelligence
data.description: James Li introduced the concept of Augmented Human Intelligence (AHI) in Barcelona, Spain on March 4, 2026. As the CEO of HONOR, a leading AI device ecosystem company, he discussed how AI has the potential to enhance human capabilities during a keynote speech. His insights into the integration of AI to amplify human potential shed light on the future of technology and innovation.

Sky News says the UK government’s initial chartered flight to evacuate people from the Middle East did not depart as planned.

data.title: Elon Musk's X Money Beta Starts Buzz On Metal Debit Card, Meanwhile Dogecoin Spikes And Asks Who Pays A 2-3% Fee When You Can Just Accept DOGE
data.description: The official Dogecoin account is urging businesses to adopt DOGE payments in order to avoid credit card fees as Elon Musk's 'X Money' payments beta rollout progresses. The memecoin recommended, "Just Accept DOGE," questioning why businesses would pay a 2-3% fee to credit card companies. In the U.S. alone, credit card firms profited $148.5 billion in 2024 from merchant fees. While global figures are difficult to pinpoint, the Dogecoin network has garnered $962,000 in transaction fees in the last year and $5.6 million over the past three years, per Token Terminal data. BitInfoCharts reported the current average transaction fee at $0.03. This information was sourced from a Motley Fool report and is elaborated on at Benzinga.com.
Sky News reports that the UK government’s first chartered flight for the Middle East crisis has been rescheduled to later on Thursday.

data.title: From the Self-Tan Experts: Coco & Eve Launches Sunny Honey Protect, a Glow-First SPF Collection
data.description: Coco & Eve, a well-known brand for achieving radiant, bronzed skin, has introduced a high-protection SPF product in New York on March 4, 2026. The brand, popular among self-tan enthusiasts globally, is expanding its offerings to cater to customers seeking both sun protection and skin enhancement. This new product aims to provide maximum protection while also improving the overall look of the skin, appealing to a wider audience concerned about skin health and appearance.

data.title: Buyer found for graffiti-covered LA skyscrapers. Oceanwide Plaza complex to be finished, windows painted in 2024.
data.description: In 2024, street artists utilized the windows of the Oceanwide Plaza complex in downtown Los Angeles as a creative outlet. The unfinished complex, which had previously been at a standstill, is set to undergo completion by a new buyer. This development marks a promising change for the project and could bring new life to the area.
